violations.text: The floors in kitchen have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/07/2026
Inspector observed leak at plumbing under the 3bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2025
Handwashing sink in the (Garden Building)kitchen is lacking a handwashing signage.A sign or poster must be posted to notify employees to wash hands. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2024

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the(Cottage Building) kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2024
The hand-washing sink in the (Cottage)kitchen was blocked by cart. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2024

Various dairy products and liquid eggs was observed held at (48-53 ) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC voluntarily disposed of food product. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2024
Unpasteurized shelled eggs were observed in refrigeration unit. Per PIC eggs were used for any style consumption.PIC informed to cease practice. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2024

The door to the outside, located in the Garden Building kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2024

The following equipment observed in poor repair: 1.Prep Unit in the Garden Kitchen located in the kitchen area was not in good repair(Ambient temperatures (45DF).TCS food were moved to another unit. Establishment not allowed to store any TCS foods in unit until repaired /replaced. 2.sanitizer dispenser located at 3 bay is not working properly. Sanitizing is not dispensing PIC put in work order. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary and chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink and dishwasher. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2024
The ceiling vents in the kitchen area has an accumulation of dust. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/22/2024
